__fixture__.name: ai_evidence_blocked_by_entitlement_expired
__fixture__.scenario: User-initiated delete of an AI retained-evidence managed copy where the managed AI broker entitlement expired between the request and the scheduled action. The job enters blocked_by_entitlement_expired; the user is pointed at entitlement renewal or at waiting for the packet-expiry timer. Local evidence copies remain user-controlled.
contract_sections: Blocked_by_entitlement_expired MUST cite the entitlement_expired blocker class.
Blocked states MUST keep expected_next_state_change_at non-null.
Remaining-location notes cite the AI retained-evidence store and the user's local device store separately.

remaining_location_notes.note: Managed evidence packets remain under the packet-expiry timer until entitlement is renewed or the packet expires.
Local copies of the evidence packet remain user-controlled and are unaffected by this blocker.

blockers.note: Managed AI broker entitlement lapsed; user is pointed at entitlement renewal or at awaiting packet-expiry.
